title: A gradient of sex linkage in the pseudoautosomal region of the human sex chromosomes

authors: Shi Q; Spriggs E; Field LL; Ko E; Barclay L; Martin RH

authors: May CA; Shone AC; Kalaydjieva L; Sajantila A; Jeffreys AJ

title: Complex events in the evolution of the human pseudoautosomal region 2 (PAR2)

title: The human pseudoautosomal regions: a review for genetic epidemiologists
authors: Flaquer A; Rappold GA; Wienker TF; Fischer C

title: A new sex-specific genetic map of the human pseudoautosomal regions (PAR1 and PAR2)
authors: Flaquer A; Fischer C; Wienker TF
evidence_role: Primary/analysis evidence for sex-specific PAR1 and PAR2 genetic maps

title: Meiosis and sex chromosome aneuploidy: how meiotic errors cause aneuploidy; how aneuploidy causes meiotic errors
authors: Hall H; Hunt P; Hassold T

title: The pseudoautosomal regions, SHOX and disease
authors: Blaschke RJ; Rappold G

authors: Monteiro B; Arenas M; Prata MJ; Amorim A

title: Evolutionary dynamics of pseudoautosomal region 1 in humans and great apes
authors: Bergman J; Schierup MH

authors: Bellott DW; Hughes JF; Skaletsky H; Owen EC; Page DC
